review_text: Beautiful park with a beautiful antenna that I urbexxed.

It's a outstanding Panoramic Plateau, with special Wood/Rockstone Benches.

The Toilets are out of order..

But there is a small but special Water Fountain.

Check this place out.

its small,clean and comfortable park ...If you wuld like to view the city this is another option . If you want to read something its the best place silent and comfortable and some books are available for children and adults , Car parking is available near to  the park ...which is blue and white parking area. In general its adventure and quite place I like it all surrounding...enjoy ....
A winding path leads to a secluded spot, where one can ascend to a higher level.
Magical park!… reachable in 5 minutes on foot

Beautiful this morning, mild temperatures, even though it's January, very clean, unique view, so worth going, the only thing, perhaps a negative, is that there are no games for children... but it's nice. Benches and a table.
A lovely walk with great views.
Small park from which you can enjoy a beautiful view and take advantage of the tables made available to have a packed lunch

I go there every now and then for a walk. It's a beautiful park with an exceptional view.
It's a shame that there are always leftovers from evening gatherings, like bottles, trash, etc. It's up to the people in charge to be more polite here.
Also, despite the ban, dogs are allowed to roam free.
